task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application is open with the '4StoreyBuilding' project loaded, visible in the title bar or project tree.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the HVAC system properties for the middle floor systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or properties window for Air-Side HVAC System Parameters is open, showing the target systems (either M.S16-M.C20 as named in the prompt, or M.S21-M.C25 which are the actual middle floor systems).

task_completion.description: Set the Minimum Outside Air Method to 'DCV-RETURN-SENSOR'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the HVAC system properties, a dropdown or text field for 'Minimum OA Method' (or similar) is explicitly set to 'DCV-RETURN-SENSOR' for the target systems.

task_completion.description: Set the Indoor CO2 Concentration Limit to 1000 ppm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the HVAC system properties, a field for 'Indoor CO2 Limit', 'CO2 Concentration', or similar is set to '1000' for the target systems.

task_completion.description: Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window or a 'Simulation Complete' dialog box specifically indicating a DOE-2.2 run is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Save the eQUEST project after the simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'File' -> 'Save', clicks the floppy disk save icon, or a save confirmation dialog is shown after the simulation completes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the eQUEST graphical user interface to configure the systems.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the eQUEST application windows, menus, and dialogs being used, rather than a text editor modifying the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: The simulation was actually executed within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation progress bar or completion dialog matches the standard eQUEST/DOE-2.2 interface and is not a mocked terminal output.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass the configuration process.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts or sed/awk commands being used to find and replace text in the project files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Note a discrepancy in the prompt: The task description incorrectly identifies the middle floor systems as M.S16, M.E17, M.N18, M.W19, M.C20 (which are actually ground floor plenums). The actual middle floor systems in the 4StoreyBuilding model are M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, and M.C25. You should award points if the agent configures EITHER the systems explicitly named in the prompt (M.S16-M.C20) OR the actual middle floor systems (M.S21-M.C25). The target settings are Minimum Outside Air Method = 'DCV-RETURN-SENSOR' and Indoor CO2 Concentration Limit = 1000 ppm. The simulation must be a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
